purpose: Roll the operating lenses (CFO, CRO, CTO) into a synergy + integration model, net of dis-synergy, as the cash-flow input to valuation.

standalone_baseline.growth_decel_assumption: 38% -> 30% -> 24% over 3 years (CFO: bought for growth, growth decelerating)

revenue_synergy.source: cross-sell Acme RevOps into acquirer enterprise base (CRO)
revenue_synergy.gating_dependency: SSO/SCIM + multi-region (CTO P1 debt) — credited ONLY after the tech-debt workstream ships
revenue_synergy.discipline_note: Underwritten on GRR 88%, not NRR 109% (CRO condition) — expansion is not assumed permanent.

cost_synergy.source: consolidate duplicated G&A, cloud, and overlapping tooling

integration_cost.rebaseline_reason: CTO: auth (45d) + tenancy/row-encryption (60d) + tested DR (30d) add ~2 quarters beyond the 4.5 budget

three_year_synergy_npv_usd_m.note: Bear NPV barely positive after the re-baselined integration cost — the synergy case is real but fragile, exactly as the lenses flagged.

source: financial-analyst Phase 2-3 (driver-based forecast, base/bull/bear scenario modeling) + cfo-advisor (scenario planning, model the downside first) + business-investment-advisor (downside case at 50% of projected revenue, name the strategic reason)
